name: Kohlrabi Information
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the leaves; save any young, tender ones to cook separately.
2. Peel off the thickened stem and cut into slices.
3. Cook by boiling, baking, steaming, or frying. Dress with butter or a sauce.
4. Young kohlrabi can be eaten raw in salads, julienne strips, and marinated in French dressing.
